meaning: n.密西西比河(发源于美国中北部湖沼区,南注墨西哥湾,是世界上最大的河流之一),密西西比州(美国州名)
examples: The water level of the Mississippi River is already 6.5 feet below normal.
It is second only to the Mississippi River in width.
His older brother, Joseph, went out to Mississippi and struck it rich in cotton.
She lives in a FEMA trailer in Pass Christian, Mississippi with her husband and five children.
Allen graduated from the University of Southern Mississippi with a bachelor's degree in Radio, Television and Film.
